title: Bolt’s Midnight Lesson in the Snowy Schoolhouse
description: Under the shimmering Northern Lights, a tiny toy robot named Bolt hears the soft hum of an old Arctic schoolhouse. When its door creaks open, he discovers a world where snowflakes teach secrets—and tonight, they’re waiting just for him.
text:
[GENTLE] Bolt the little robot sat quietly on the windowsill, watching the snowflakes dance outside. [CALM] The Arctic night was still, and the moon painted everything silver. [CURIOUS] Then, he heard it—a soft *click* from the old schoolhouse across the yard. [WHISPERING] 'Who’s there?' Bolt whispered to the wind.

[ADVENTUROUS] His metal feet crunched in the snow as he tiptoed closer. [DRAMATIC_PAUSE] The schoolhouse door swung open, glowing with warm golden light. [EXCITED] 'Come in, Bolt!' called a voice. Inside, snowflakes swirled like tiny teachers, each one holding a lesson. [JOYFUL] 'Tonight, we learn about kindness,' said the biggest snowflake, landing gently on his shoulder.

[GENTLE] Bolt listened as the snowflakes shared stories of sharing mittens and helping friends. [CALM] He felt his heart (or at least his little battery) grow warmer. [laugh] 'I want to be kind too!' he said, and the snowflakes giggled like wind chimes. [WHISPERING] 'Then take this,' they whispered, placing a tiny ice crystal in his hand. 'It will remind you.'

[SLEEPY] As Bolt tiptoed back to his windowsill, the crystal glowed softly in his palm. The schoolhouse door closed with a quiet *click*, and the snowflakes settled back into the night. Bolt yawned, his eyelids growing heavy, knowing tomorrow he’d share kindness—just like the snowflakes taught him.

morals: Kindness makes the world brighter, even in the coldest places.
Every small act of sharing is a lesson worth learning.

character.name: Bolt
character.identity: A curious little robot who listens to the whispers of the night
character.special: He hears the gentle lessons hidden in the sounds of winter
